Class TacletIndex

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.TacletIndex
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, RuleIndex<NoPosTacletApp>
public abstract class TacletIndex extends Object implements RuleIndex<NoPosTacletApp>
manages all applicable Taclets (more precisely: Taclets with instantiations but without position information, the NoPosTacletApps) at one node. It is a persistent implementation. Taclets can be added because the Taclets allow to introduce new rules during runtime. It offers selective get methods for different kinds of rules.

    • add

      public void add(Rule taclet)
      adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to this index. If rule instance is not known rule is not added
      Specified by:
      add in interface RuleIndex<NoPosTacletApp>
      Parameters:
      taclet - the Taclet and its instantiation info to be added

    • add

      Parameters:

    • matchTaclets

      protected abstract ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> matchTaclets(@NonNull ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> tacletApps, RuleFilter p_filter, PosInOccurrence pos, LogicServices services)
      Filter the given list of taclet apps, and match their find parts at the given position of the sequent

    • getAntecedentTaclet

      public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getAntecedentTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos, RuleFilter filter, LogicServices services)
      get all Taclets for the antecedent.
      Specified by:
      getAntecedentTaclet in interface RuleIndex<NoPosTacletApp>
      Parameters:
      pos - the PosOfOccurrence describing the formula for which to look for top level taclets
      filter - Only return taclets the filter selects
      services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
      Returns:
      IList containing all applicable rules and the corresponding instantiations to get the rule fit.

    • getSuccedentTaclet

      IList containing all applicable rules and the corresponding instantiations to get the rule fit.

      Specified by:

    • getNoFindTaclet

      public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getNoFindTaclet(RuleFilter filter, LogicServices services)
      get all Taclets having no find expression.
      Specified by:
      getNoFindTaclet in interface RuleIndex<NoPosTacletApp>
      Parameters:
      filter - Only return taclets the filter selects
      services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
      Returns:
      IList containing all applicable rules and an empty part for the instantiations because no instantiations are necessary.

    • lookup

      public NoPosTacletApp lookup(Name name)
      returns a NoPosTacletApp whose Taclet has a name that equals the given name. If more Taclets have the same name an arbitrary Taclet with that name is returned.
      Specified by:
      lookup in interface RuleIndex<NoPosTacletApp>
      Parameters:
      name - the name to lookup
      Returns:
      the found NoPosTacletApp or null if no matching Taclet is there

    • lookup

      public @Nullable NoPosTacletApp lookup(String name)
      returns a NoPosTacletApp whose Taclet has a name that equals the given name. If more Taclets have the same name an arbitrary Taclet with that name is returned.
      Specified by:
      lookup in interface RuleIndex<NoPosTacletApp>
      Parameters:
      name - the name to lookup
      Returns:
      the found NoPosTacletApp or null if no matching Taclet is there
